name: Eugene Menski
tagline: I read organizations the way a physicist reads a system — finding the hidden constraint behind the symptoms.
contact_blurb: I take on a small number of senior engagements — delivery and AI-transformation leadership, advisory, and consulting. If your operating model is lagging your ambitions, that's exactly the conversation I want.

hero.headline: I Help Engineering Organizations Become Predictable During Change.
hero.subheadline: Combining systems thinking, flow analytics, organizational design, and AI transformation.
hero.bio: I started by studying physical systems. Today I study organizational ones. My work focuses on uncovering the hidden constraints preventing engineering organizations from delivering predictably.

terminal.whoami: systems thinker · delivery leader · now applying both to AI
